queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and decreased credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of negative checking account balances on the mitigation of credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk reduction linked to savings account balances below 100 DM.
